source_csv: AI Chatbot Evaluation Dataset - Evaluation Dataset.csv
selection_rule: Answer Review Completed == 'Yes' and Question Type != 'Unanswerable'

questions.question: Which actions have the highest positive impact for vulnerable populations?
What hazards are on the rise?
What hazards does this location face in severity order?
What percentage of GDP is at risk?
Which hazards are expected to have the highest financial impact?
Are there any goals set for the year 2050?
What is the status of the air quality initiatives?
Which actions are being implemented to improve sewerage, wastewater management and remediation?
What is the projected risk level and trend for urban flooding?
What is the anticipated risk level for extreme heat in the medium-term?
List the climate hazards addressed by the city's green cover expansion goal.
Are there any infrastructure rehabilitation planned?
Are early warning systems in place for reported hazards?
